name: The Welsh Patagonia Mimosa Ship Memorial

osm_tags.inscription: 1865 Mimosa 2015 This plaque records the departure from Liverpool of the sailing ship 'Mimosa' on 28 May 1865, with 162 Welsh people (remembering also the three who went out before them).
osm_tags.inscription2: They landed at Port Madryn, Patadonia, on 28 July 1865 where they established a Welsh speaking settlement which survives to this day.
osm_tags.name: The Welsh Patagonia Mimosa Ship Memorial
